caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a matching green baseball cap, and black headphones is recorded speaking into a microphone in what appears to be a clothing store. His green shirt features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" in white lettering. In the background, clothing racks, mannequins dressed in white and blue, and framed photos on the wall are visible. A banner to the left reads "UNIQUE FASHION." The man is positioned behind a desk with two microphones; he begins by looking to his left, then turns toward the center, speaking and gesturing with his hands. A logo containing the number "3" and the text "THE" appears in a circle in the bottom left of the scene, while the text "BOY FLY 101" is visible in the bottom right. Throughout the sequence, the camera remains stationary while the man's facial expressions and hand gestures shift as he talks.
